title: AEM 6850
text:
About
AEM 6850 is taught by Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea at the Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management, Cornell University.
For a sense of the format and tooling philosophy, see the related course AEM 7010 (Spring 2026).
